faqs.question: 1. How do I create an account?

blocks.value: You can create an account by registering with your email address or mobile number and setting a secure password.
After registration, you may be required to complete identity verification before accessing certain features.

faqs.question: 2. Why do I need to complete identity verification (KYC)?

value: Increase account security and usage limits

blocks.value: Verification requirements may vary depending on your region and account activity.

faqs.question: 3. How can I secure my account?

blocks.value: We strongly recommend enabling multiple security measures, including:
Using all available security features significantly reduces the risk of unauthorized access.
2FA adds an extra layer of protection by requiring a one-time verification code in addition to your password.
Codes are typically generated via an authenticator app or sent by SMS, depending on your settings.

faqs.question: 5. What should I do if I forget my password?

blocks.value: You can reset your password using the “Forgot Password” option on the login page.
For security reasons, withdrawals may be temporarily restricted after a password reset.

faqs.question: 6. What happens if I detect suspicious activity?

blocks.value: If you notice any unusual activity:

value: Disable withdrawals (reach out to customer support)
Review recent login and transaction records

blocks.value: Prompt action helps minimize potential losses.

faqs.question: 7. Can I log in from multiple devices?

blocks.value: Yes. You may log in from multiple devices, but each new device or location may require additional verification to protect your account.

faqs.question: 8. Why can’t I log in to my account?

blocks.value: This may be due to an incorrect password, expired verification code, network issues, or account restrictions. Try resetting your password or contact 1MAX Support if the issue persists.

faqs.question: 9. How to identify our official 1MAX accounts?

value: Look for Verified Badges Official 1MAX accounts on social media, messaging platforms, and forums will have platform verification marks (like a blue check).
Check the Username Carefully Official accounts use consistent and exact usernames. Watch out for similar or misspelled names trying to impersonate us.
Follow Links from Our Official Website. Always access our social media or support channels through links listed on the official 1MAX website ; not from random posts.
Ask Support If unsure. If you’re not certain whether an account is official, contact our customer support team at support@1max.com for verification.
